task: Implement ADR-001 PoA bootstrap for ClawChain (clawinfra/claw-chain repo, issue #28). Add public_testnet_config() to node/src/chain_spec.rs with 3 SR25519/ED25519 authority keys (Validator1/2/3, expandable to 7-10), ChainType::Live, chain ID 'clawchain_testnet_public', proper token distribution (1M CLAW stash per validator, 20% treasury), sudo account, and PoS transition path comments. Wire it in node/src/command.rs as --chain testnet. Also: create /etc/systemd/system/clawchain-node.service on VPS root@135.181.157.121 (SSH key ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_alexchen), stop the raw process, enable service with --chain local (testnet binary needs rebuild), verify blocks. Push branch feat/poa-bootstrap, open PR linking #28. Use gh CLI (authenticated as AlexChen31337). Clone to /tmp/claw-chain-poa. Cargo clippy clean required.
